name: docgen-studio
description: Turn your Excel data and Word template into hundreds of personalised documents, PDFs, and email drafts — locally, with no cloud and no subscription.
author: Philip Prescott-Decie

scripts.dist:linux: pnpm build:release-ready && pnpm runtime:assert:linux-x64 && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb rpm pacman
scripts.dist:linux:appimage: pnpm build:release-ready && pnpm runtime:assert:linux-x64 && electron-builder --linux AppImage
scripts.dist:linux:arch: pnpm build:release-ready && pnpm runtime:assert:linux-x64 && electron-builder --linux pacman
scripts.dist:linux:deb: pnpm build:release-ready && pnpm runtime:assert:linux-x64 && electron-builder --linux deb
scripts.dist:linux:dir: pnpm build:release-ready && pnpm runtime:assert:linux-x64 && electron-builder --linux dir
scripts.dist:linux:fedora: pnpm build:release-ready && pnpm runtime:assert:linux-x64 && electron-builder --linux rpm
scripts.dist:linux:pacman: pnpm build:release-ready && pnpm runtime:assert:linux-x64 && electron-builder --linux pacman
scripts.dist:linux:rpm: pnpm build:release-ready && pnpm runtime:assert:linux-x64 && electron-builder --linux rpm
scripts.dist:linux:ubuntu: pnpm build:release-ready && pnpm runtime:assert:linux-x64 && electron-builder --linux deb
